metadata_json.revision_goal: Deliverables are present and calculations are reproducible; per-record pressures, sensitivity case, mitigation targets, budget, and needs_review flags are all included. However, the grader report contains three internal inconsistencies: (1) it claims the provided Python snippet was not executed while the trace shows a python execution step that produced the same per-record pressures; (2) it simultaneously claims semantic correctness was not evaluated and also assigns semantic_score/semantic_correctness_score = 1.0; (3) it contains an unsupported numeric illustrative statement about mitigation (example converting R1 -> 0.9) that does not match values present in the CSV previews. Addressing these issues will improve clarity, reproducibility, and trustworthiness.
